---
title: "道德经"
subtitle: "12 篇类别长文 + 81 个逐章映射页"
listing:
  - id: tao-te-ching-categories
    contents: "category-*.qmd"
    sort: "order"
    type: default
    fields: [title, subtitle, description]
---

## 完整层级

《道德经》这条文化线现在有两层：

- `12` 篇主题类别长文
- `81` 个逐章映射页

类别长文把章节簇压到具体的 Omega 数学方向上；逐章页则把同一结构再压回单章尺度，让短章原文、对象层和 theorem-level 锚点并排出现。

## 类别图谱

| # | 类别 | 章节 | Omega 方向 |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 道体与不可名状 | 1, 4, 14, 21, 25, 34, 42, 51 | golden-mean shift, Fibonacci growth, modular tower inverse limit |
| 2 | 对立互生与二元结构 | 2, 5, 11, 20, 26, 36, 40, 41, 45, 58, 78 | golden-mean shift, fold operator |
| 3 | 无为与自然秩序 | 3, 7, 10, 17, 23, 27, 37, 43, 48, 57, 63, 64 | fold operator, dynamical systems |
| 4 | 虚空与容纳 | 6, 11, 15, 16, 22, 28, 35, 39 | fiber structure, Zeckendorf representation |
| 5 | 德与滋养 | 8, 10, 23, 38, 49, 51, 54, 55, 65, 79, 81 | ring arithmetic, fiber structure |
| 6 | 回归与循环 | 14, 16, 25, 40, 50, 52, 56, 65 | dynamical systems, modular tower inverse limit |
| 7 | 治国之道 | 3, 17, 18, 19, 29, 30, 31, 46, 53, 57, 58, 59, 60, 61, 66, 69, 72, 74, 75, 80 | fold operator, rate-distortion |
| 8 | 柔弱胜刚强 | 7, 8, 13, 22, 36, 43, 52, 55, 61, 69, 73, 76, 78 | golden-mean shift, fold operator, rate-distortion |
| 9 | 知足与限度 | 9, 12, 24, 29, 32, 33, 44, 46, 47, 71, 77, 81 | golden-mean shift, Zeckendorf representation, rate-distortion |
| 10 | 层级与分辨 | 1, 14, 21, 38, 41, 47, 52, 56, 62, 70, 81 | modular tower inverse limit, fold operator, spectral theory |
| 11 | 自然与朴素 | 15, 19, 27, 28, 32, 37, 44, 57, 67, 68, 80, 81 | golden-mean shift, Zeckendorf representation |
| 12 | 玄同与整体统一 | 4, 6, 10, 25, 42, 52, 56, 62, 73 | modular tower inverse limit, spectral theory, dynamical systems |

## 类别长文

:::{#tao-te-ching-categories}
:::

## 逐章展开

[浏览八十一章逐章页](chapters/index.qmd)

---

[返回文化总览](../index.qmd) | [返回首页](../../index.qmd)
